Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "CENTROPODS-3000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Centropods.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $3000 which sets $0342 in the tape buffer to $14, the same as it would be when actually loading from tape. This is to allow a protection check at $0FF4 to succeed and allow the game to run.
